title: Ophiocaulon gummifer
intro: Ophiocaulon gummifer, also known as Ophiocaulon, is a plant species belonging to the Aristolochiaceae family, commonly used in traditional medicine. The health benefits of Ophiocaulon include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties, which have been shown to aid in the treatment of various ailments, such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Ophiocaulon include aristolochic acids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Ophiocaulon is often prepared in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and is commonly used in the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory infections.
